_about: Declared migrations for NONCOMPLIANT repo labels (live on GitHub but absent from labels.json) -> the canonical label. gh-issues-sync.py --labels: for each repo label not in labels.json, if it appears here it MIGRATES (relabel every issue/PR carrying it to the target, then delete the stale label); otherwise it is FLAGGED, never silently deleted (G2). Each alias is a ratified decision, not a guess.
